title: medicago hispida var. denticulata
intro: Medicago hispida var. denticulata, also known as prickly medic or denticulata medic, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Medicago hispida var. denticulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves, stems, and roots, and can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions.
